chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-333 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 07-05-2025 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Sawan Khan Jagirani, Advocate for respondents-SIDA. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G. **** On 28.03.2025, the following order was passed: “None present for the petitioner; no intimation is received. This petition is liable to be dismissed for non- prosecution; however, in the interest of justice, adjourned to 07.05.2025, for which intimation notice be issued to counsel for petitioner”. Today, neither petitioner is present nor his counsel is in attendance; no intimation is received so far, which reflects that the petitioner and his counsel have lost interest in proceeding with this matter. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed application(s), if any. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
